description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 3 hrs 55 mins of coding time, averaging 58 mins per day. His work was split across 5 projects, with the largest shares in Java (42%), Bash (18%), Python (14%), and Markdown (14%). There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
